title: Job Opening Teacher at S.Chand Group

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at S.Chand Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at S.Chand Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About S.Chand Group:
S.Chand Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group!
